message:
refactor: Zig code quality pass — extract shared allocator, consolidate filters, deduplicate bench fixtures

- Extract alloc.zig: shared dlmalloc vtable used by main.zig and rule_engine.zig
- Consolidate 9 in-place filter functions into comptime-generic filterGeneric + 6 predicates
- Extract applyRelationalFilter dispatch helper in rule_engine evaluate()
- Merge node_children/node_named_children into serializeChildren(named_only)
- Merge match_preceding/match_following into matchSiblings(preceding)
- Extract addMatchFromNode in matcher.zig, reuse across 6+ call sites
- Merge OP_PATTERN/OP_KIND/OP_REGEX and OP_ALL/OP_ANY decoder branches
- Fix parent() not propagating _compile pattern cache in SgNode
- Extract SMALL/MEDIUM/LARGE_SOURCE fixtures from bench files into bench/utils.ts
- Net reduction: ~291 lines across Zig + bench code
